summary: A 3.5-minute single-camera recording of HUD Secretary Scott Turner delivering budget testimony before a Congressional committee, with his 'Hon. Scott Turner' witness nameplate visible the whole time. The audio is a long policy monologue on homeownership, ending CDBG, the Fair Housing Act, homelessness and work requirements. Out of scope: raw congressional testimony, no music or cinematic editing; mis-tagged recruitment.
notable_text: Hon. Scott Turner, Secretary, Department of Housing and Urban Development
